chapter_title.en: Chapter 52 – Inheritance of the son of the cursed mother (by her husband)

text: عَنْهُ عَنْ وُهَيْبِ بْنِ حَفْصٍ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ لَاعَنَ امْرَأَتَهُ قَالَ يَلْحَقُ الْوَلَدُ بِأُمِّهِ وَ يَرِثُهُ أَخْوَالُهُ وَ لَا يَرِثُهُمْ فَسَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الرَّجُلِ إِنْ أَكْذَبَ نَفْسَهُ قَالَ يَلْحَقُ بِهِ الْوَلَدُ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Wuheyb Bin Hafs, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who cursed his wife. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The child would be attached to its mother, and his maternal uncles would inherit him, and he would not inherit them’. So I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the man if he (admits) having lied himself, he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The child is joined to him’.
